definition_en: To increase speed
example: The car accelerated quickly on the motorway.

definition_en: A device used to slow down or stop a vehicle
example: She pressed the brake hard to avoid the cyclist.

definition_en: A substance such as petrol or diesel used to power an engine
example: The car ran out of fuel on the motorway.

definition_en: A vehicle powered by an electric motor and battery
example: Sales of electric vehicles have risen sharply.

definition_en: Gases released into the atmosphere by engines or industry
example: New regulations aim to reduce carbon emissions from vehicles.

definition_en: A person travelling on foot
example: Drivers must give way to pedestrians at crossings.

definition_en: A long line of vehicles that cannot move freely
example: We were stuck in a traffic jam for two hours.

definition_en: To pass another vehicle that is moving in the same direction
example: It is dangerous to overtake on a narrow road.

definition_en: The metal plate on a vehicle showing its registration number
example: The police noted the licence plate of the suspicious car.

definition_en: A wide road designed for fast, long-distance travel
example: The accident caused delays on the motorway.

definition_en: A car that uses both a petrol engine and an electric motor
example: She bought a hybrid car to reduce fuel costs.

definition_en: Regular work done to keep a vehicle in good condition
example: Regular maintenance can prevent expensive repairs.

definition_en: To pull a vehicle using another vehicle
example: The broken-down car was towed to the garage.

definition_en: Heavy traffic causing slow movement on roads
example: Congestion in the city centre is worst during rush hour.

definition_en: A safety strap worn across the body in a vehicle
example: Always wear your seatbelt when travelling by car.

definition_en: A circular junction where traffic flows around a central point
example: Turn left at the roundabout.

definition_en: The system of springs and shock absorbers that supports a vehicle
example: The rough road damaged the car's suspension.

definition_en: A self-driving vehicle that uses sensors and AI to navigate
example: Autonomous vehicles are being tested in several cities.

definition_en: Construction or repairs being done on a road
example: The roadworks caused major delays this morning.

definition_en: An arrangement where people share a car journey to reduce costs
example: We carpool to work to save money on fuel.

definition_en: The control panel in a vehicle showing speed and other information
example: The warning light appeared on the dashboard.

definition_en: The pipe that releases gases produced by a vehicle's engine
example: Black smoke from the exhaust pipe suggests engine problems.
